summary: Vertical video. An entry in the USCIS Alien Registration Requirement PSA series, titled 'The Cost of Inaction.' It opens and closes with an ARR logo card and a USCIS.gov/alienregistration card. Captioned voiceover narration references fines and incarceration over stock B-roll of a man being handcuffed and detainees on an ICE detention bus. On-screen captions transcribe the speech. On-screen and spoken text includes 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', 'THE COST OF INACTION', 'If you fail to comply, ... and incarceration', 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION', and 'Aliens are encouraged to visit'.
notable_text: ARR Alien Registration Requirement; THE COST OF INACTION; If you fail to comply, ... and incarceration; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION; Aliens are encouraged to visit
